notes: Chunk 44 (Template D, Tier B) complete 2026-06-10. 25 new routes: EU-to-USA (Greece/Austria/Belgium/Finland/Malta/Romania/Cyprus/Hungary/Bulgaria/Croatia all x united-states); to-UK unlisted (Morocco/Bangladesh/Myanmar/Ethiopia x united-kingdom); EU-to-UK listed (Slovakia/Luxembourg x united-kingdom); SE Asia outbound (Japan x Mexico/Brazil/Indonesia; Thailand x Malaysia/Mexico/Brazil/Indonesia; South Korea x Mexico/Brazil). Blog Day 14: pet-transport-within-uk.md (Marcus Webb, 2200 words, DEFRA Type 1 ATA, domestic couriers). Routes 5531->5556, blog 420->421, pages 6324->6350. Next: Chunk 45 (Template E, Tier B). Blog Day 15 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
